LASERDISC ARCHIVE 1.0 — FULL PROJECT UPLOAD STEPS

1. Upload everything inside this folder to the new GitHub repository.
2. Commit message: Release LaserDisc Archive 1.0
3. Wait for Actions green checkmark.
4. In Settings > Pages, make sure Source is GitHub Actions.
5. Open the app and confirm:
   - Header says LaserDisc Archive
   - Version shows v1.0
   - Collection starts blank
   - Add/Browse/Settings/Movie Night work
